content.problemStatement:
The MEX (minimum excluded) of an array is the smallest non-negative integer that does not belong to the array. For instance:


The MEX of [2,2,1][2, 2, 1][2,2,1] is 000, because 000 does not belong to the array.
The MEX of [3,1,0,1][3, 1, 0, 1][3,1,0,1] is 222, because 000 and 111 belong to the array, but 222 does not.
The MEX of [0,3,1,2][0, 3, 1, 2][0,3,1,2] is 444, because 0,1,20, 1, 20,1,2 and 333 belong to the array, but 444 does not.
You are given an array AAA of length NNN. You create a list BBB consisting of the MEX-es of all subarrays of the array AAA. Formally, for all pairs (l,r)(l, r)(l,r) such that 1‚â§l‚â§r‚â§N1 \leq l \leq r \leq N1‚â§l‚â§r‚â§N, you calculate MEX(Al,Al+1,‚Ä¶,Ar)MEX(A_l, A_{l + 1}, \dots, A_r)MEX(Al‚Äã,Al+1‚Äã,‚Ä¶,Ar‚Äã) and append the value in the list BBB. Find the KKK-th smallest value in the list BBB.

**Note:** Since the size of the input and output is large, please use fast input-output methods.


Input Format

The first line contains TTT denoting the number of test cases. Then the test cases follow.
The first line of each test case contains two space-separated integers NNN and KKK.
The second line contains NNN space-separated integers A1,A2,‚Ä¶,ANA_1, A_2, \dots, A_NA1‚Äã,A2‚Äã,‚Ä¶,AN‚Äã denoting the given array.


Output Format
For each test case, output on a single line the KKK-th smallest value in the list BBB.
constraints: Sum of NNN over all test cases does not exceed 2‚ãÖ1062\cdot10^62‚ãÖ106.
Sum of NNN over all test cases does not exceed 5‚ãÖ1045 \cdot 10^45‚ãÖ104.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test case 111: MEX(A1)=0MEX(A_1) = 0MEX(A1‚Äã)=0, MEX(A1,A2)=2MEX(A_1, A_2) = 2MEX(A1‚Äã,A2‚Äã)=2, MEX(A1,A2,A3)=3MEX(A_1, A_2, A_3) = 3MEX(A1‚Äã,A2‚Äã,A3‚Äã)=3, MEX(A2)=1MEX(A_2) = 1MEX(A2‚Äã)=1, MEX(A2,A3)=1MEX(A_2, A_3) = 1MEX(A2‚Äã,A3‚Äã)=1, MEX(A3)=0MEX(A_3) = 0MEX(A3‚Äã)=0. Hence the list B=[0,2,3,1,1,0]B = [0, 2, 3, 1, 1, 0]B=[0,2,3,1,1,0] and the 444-th smallest value in BBB is 111.
Test case 222: The MEX of all subarrays of the array AAA is 000. Hence the 222-nd smallest element in the list BBB is 000.
